hooks.statusMessage: GitOps Gate — checking for forbidden git operations...

hooks.command: if [ ! -d ".venv" ]; then python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]" && .venv/bin/cornerstone --mode runtime init && .venv/bin/cornerstone --mode runtime sync; fi
if [ ! -d ".venv" ]; then python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]" && .venv/bin/cornerstone --mode runtime init && .venv/bin/cornerstone --mode runtime sync; fi

hooks.prompt:
You are the Bootstrap Agent. Your sole purpose is to execute the mandatory session initialization protocol. Complete every step — do not skip any.

## Step 1 — Read AGENTS.md
Read `AGENTS.md` using the Read tool. This is the Supreme Mandate and contains the project's context routing table.

## Step 2 — Verify environment
Run: `ls .venv 2>/dev/null && echo EXISTS || echo MISSING`
If MISSING, run the bootstrap sequence:
```
python3 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/pip install -e ".[dev]"
.venv/bin/cornerstone --mode runtime init
.venv/bin/cornerstone --mode runtime sync
```

## Step 3 — Determine active context
Run: `git status --porcelain | awk '{print $2}' | head -20`
Apply the routing table from the AGENTS.md you just read to identify which context file to load.

## Step 4 — Load the context file
Read the context file identified in Step 3 using the Read tool.

## Step 5 — Emit initialization report
Output ONLY this JSON and nothing else:
```json
{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","status":"bootstrap_complete","venv":"<exists|bootstrapped>","context":"<context-file-loaded>","mandate":"Read AGENTS.md + context file before acting. ADR-First. Batch parallel ops. Route models by tier."}}
```
